caption:
ad This has to be the cutestttt Japanese bakery in London! From loaded bagels to onigiri shaped croissants to the viral capybara and bunny jellies, you’ll be taking all the aesthetic shots here.

This is @tokyobagellondon 🥯 Check out their new spring menu including matcha crepes and a delicious Sakura matcha! 🍵 

Share this with someone who would love to go!

#tokyobagel #japanesebakery #wheretoeatinlondon

transcription.text: This might just be the cutest Japanese bakery in London. From capybara and bunny jellies, to delicious matcha and crepes, say hello to Tokyo Bagel. The interiors are so beautiful and they do a range of sweet and savoury options. Their savoury bagels are fully loaded. I went for the tofu katsu one, it was so good and the desserts are really creative. This was a chocolate hazelnut croissant but shaped like an onigiri and they also do french toast, crepes and so much more. They have a delicious new spring menu with drinks like a new sakura blossom matcha which was absolutely delicious. So definitely check it out for brunch and find all the details in the caption.
